ideation: This sequence aims to capture the wide-eyed, open-mouthed excitement of the 😃 emoji.  It starts with hands covering the mouth to mimic the surprised or joyous gasp, and then transitions to a more open, expressive arm gesture.  Throughout, I'll ensure that the movements are distinct and avoid unnecessary intermediary steps. In the first frame, both hands cover the mouth. joint1 rotates the arms slightly outward, joint2 raises them, and the wrists are sharply angled inward so palms face each other. This conveys the initial surprise or joy. In the second frame, the arms open slightly, moving away from the face. joint1 rotates the arms further outward, and joint2 lowers them a bit, while the wrists begin to straighten.  This represents the beginning of a more expressive gesture. By the third frame, the arms extend outward and upward, with palms facing forward. joint1 rotates slightly inward to create the open stance and joint2 raises the arms to add excitement, and the wrists align so palms face forward. This shows the emotion becoming even more unrestrained. In the fourth frame, the arms reach their peak expression, high above the head. joint1 remains relatively neutral, and joint2 pitches the arms upward to their highest point, with wrists remaining forward. This symbolizes the peak of the emotion. Finally, the fifth frame brings the arms slightly lower in a relaxed, open position, with joint1 neutral and joint2 pitching down a little, the wrists also neutral, as if ready to react to whatever caused the joy or surprise.  This creates a natural ending to the expression.

frames.beat: hands cover mouth in joyful surprise
arms open slightly, releasing the gasp
arms sweep outward and upward, full of glee
arms reach high, celebrating the moment
arms settle into a happy, open posture
